releaseNotes:
- Logos import: fix orientation, add Create spinner, parallelize processing
- Make Site required on New Job with same validation as Technician
- Apply panel filter and orientation to Logos imports
- Add Import from Logos to new project flow
- Data Room delete-with-reassign + job picker fixes
- Data Room + job picker UX fixes (PM feedback)
- Add Data Room (Companies/Sites/Contacts/Technicians) and normalize Project to Site
- Show AR Preview controls and spinner immediately on toggle
- Security: System.Drawing.Common CVE pin, trusted-config licensing, NuGet audit
- Stitching: per-image opacity slider with Auto (80%) / Reset (100%)
- Tech debt cleanup + AR camera spinner UX
- Stitching: remove canvas frame, fit tight bbox of placed images into x-ray dim
- Ar-preview: remove red bracket corners from panel housing
- Round 5 — center camera frame, full-width dotted bg, 1in border spacing
- Round 4 — top-right exposure, layout centering, camera spinner
- Round 3 — landscape orientation, top-left exposure, UI polish
- POC for field test
